label: Shuttered Sleep Niche
description: Shuttered Sleep Niche is a compact bedroom carved from the flat’s slagcrete shell, its corners squared and clad in black vitrystone tiles dulled by ash abrasion. A built-in bunk occupies one wall, framed by storage niches with gasketed panels and recessed latches designed to remain closed under electrostatic shudder. The sole viewport is a slit aperture fitted with layered shutters and vox-dampening mesh, turning auroral glare into a thin, bruised seam of light. Overarmored service conduits track the ceiling line, their sealed junctions reinforcing the room’s purpose as a quiet refuge within Nocturnis Bastion’s storm-hardened hab-stack.
